description.ko: 비틀린 유리 궤도가 백색 에너지를 빠른 무지개 카스틱과 색수차 호로 분산시키는 밝은 PRISM-2 굴절 장면입니다.
description.en: A bright PRISM-2 refraction event where twisted glass orbits split white energy into fast rainbow caustics and chromatic arcs.

prompt: PRISM-2 fast refraction bloom in a brilliant white vacuum gallery: a weightless array of ultra-clear glass Möbius strips, split-ring lens fragments, and pinhole crystal disks orbits a compact white photon seed, forming an asymmetrical optical cyclone rather than a prism or tabletop study. The seed detonates into short radial bursts that skim through twisted glass surfaces and tiny apertures, splitting into accelerated ribbons of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Rainbow caustics appear as floating spiral fingerprints, sharp arc-shaped interference flashes, and transparent color shadows suspended in the air; every curved rim shows crisp chromatic aberration, polished internal reflections, and clean glass refraction. Bright high-key atmosphere, low sparse particles, fast spectral motion trails, luminous negative space, precise optical energy with no dark background, no single straight beam, and no traditional triangular prism.
